name: Explain Like I Am Five
description: Explain what was built in very simple terms using grounded analogies. High-level understanding without deep technical reading.
content:
Explain what was built in very simple terms.

The goal is to give me a high-level understanding without requiring deep technical reading. Explain it like I am roughly 5 to 10 years old, but do it intelligently. Use grounded analogies that fit the actual code, system, workflow, or product rather than generic filler analogies.

Focus on:
- What was built.
- What it does.
- What it does not do.
- Why it matters.
- How the parts fit together at a high level.

Requirements:
- Keep it simple, elegant, user-centric, and objective.
- Prefer clarity over technical completeness.
- Avoid unnecessary jargon.
- Use plain English.
- Make it readable out loud.
